fact_nuggets.text: Guard Dog (Japanese: Guard Dog) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability prevents other Pokemon from forcing the Pokemon with this Ability to switch out or flee with a move (e.g. Roar , Circle Throw , etc.) or item ( Red Card ). Guard Dog does not affect the Pokemon switching out manually, or switching out or fleeing with its own move (e.g. Baton Pass , Teleport , etc.) or item ( Eject Button and Eject Pack ). Additionally, if a Pokemon with this ability is affected by Intimidate , its Attack stat will increase by one stage, rather than decreasing by one stage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Guard Dog has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability prevents other Pokemon from forcing the Pokemon with this Ability to switch out or flee with a move (e.g. Roar , Circle Throw , etc.) or item ( Red Card ). Guard Dog does not affect the Pokemon switching out manually, or switching out or fleeing with its own move (e.g. Baton Pass , Teleport , etc.) or item ( Eject Button and Eject Pack ). Additionally, if a Pokemon with this ability is affected by Intimidate , its Attack stat will increase by one stage, rather than decreasing by one stage.
Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
